title: taraxacum adustum
intro: Taraxacum adustum, also known as the bitter dandelion, is a plant species that belongs to the dandelion genus. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve liver and gallbladder issues, and act as a diuretic. The health benefits of Taraxacum adustum include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve kidney function, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum adustum include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to make medicines for various health conditions.
